dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8685 IH: Protect the Presidency Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Gooden (for himself and Mr. Steube) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend section 1751 of title 18, United States Code, to include the death penalty as punishment for an attempt to assassinate certain individuals.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protect the Presidency Act.

section.header: Punishment for assassination of certain individuals
section.text: Section 1751(c) of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting death or before imprisonment.
